# Juan Almeida — Full Stack & AI Engineer

> Personal portfolio and engineering case studies.

## Identity

- Name: Juan Almeida
- Role: Full Stack & AI Engineer
- Location: Remote
- Website: https://www.juanelojga.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/juan-almeida-03806367
- GitHub: https://github.com/juanelojga

## Core Skills

- Frontend: React, Next.js, Vue.js, Astro, TypeScript, JavaScript
- Backend: Django, Express, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, REST APIs, GraphQL
- AI/ML: Python, LangChain, OpenAI API, RAG Pipelines, ML Workflows
- Infrastructure: AWS, Docker, CI/CD, GitHub Actions, Netlify, Vercel

## Featured Projects

- AIEcommerce: Autonomous PC assembly and marketplace pipeline using LangGraph agents, Django, and MedusaJS
- Narbox: Package consolidation and global logistics platform with Django GraphQL API and Next.js 15
- PBXAI: Real-time voice AI orchestration engine bridging VoIP telephony (Asterisk) with generative AI

## Site Structure

- /en/ — English homepage
- /es/ — Spanish homepage
- /en/case-study/[slug] — Project case studies (English)
- /es/case-study/[slug] — Project case studies (Spanish)

## Blog

Technical articles on AI systems, full-stack development, and engineering culture.
